headline: Henry turns the screw as Sofia’s season goes pear-shaped
text: Henry had the day out, with Canada smashing Qatar 6-0 to keep him top of the pile. Jack also fancied it, as Switzerland beat Bosnia & Herzegovina 4-1. Rosaria got a tidy win too, with Mexico edging South Korea 1-0. At the wrong end, Christopher took a bump, and Chris had a rough one as Bosnia & Herzegovina were punted. Overall, Henry is best with 8 points, while Sofia is bottom with 1 point and looking distinctly wobbly.
